metadata.title: Product Capabilities
metadata.description: Outcome-based product capabilities for the Real Estate Marketplace domain, covering discovery, owner enablement, agency operations, market intelligence, and trust services.

definitions.productCapability: A high-level, outcome-based ability that delivers customer or business value.
definitions.productBrick: A reusable implementation-facing building block used to realize one or more product capabilities.

metadata.flowModelNote: Each capability now carries only capability-specific flows. Each flow step lists the bricks and external systems used inside that capability.

capabilities.name: Discover Relevant Homes
capabilities.description: Help property seekers enter the marketplace and immediately see relevant homes.

flows.title: Discover Relevant Homes
flows.description: Help property seekers enter the marketplace and immediately see relevant homes.

steps.title: Open home feed
keyFacts: Open home feed is a meaningful step in the seeker journey flow.
Users need clear guidance and feedback here to keep moving forward.
painPoints: Users drop out when open home feed feels fragmented across channels.
Confidence decreases when the product does not explain what happens next.

dependencies.name: Homepage
dependencies.description: Introductory pages of Brand_I brands, serving marketing data and (personalized) links to other critical elements of the site (detail pages, search...)
dependencies.how: Uses Homepage for introductory pages of Brand_I brands, serving marketing data and in open home feed.

steps.title: Browse featured properties
keyFacts: This step shapes first relevance and perceived product quality.
Users decide quickly whether the marketplace understands their intent.
painPoints: Low relevance or weak filtering creates early abandonment.
Users lose trust when the result set feels noisy or poorly explained.

dependencies.name: Homepage
dependencies.description: Introductory pages of Brand_I brands, serving marketing data and (personalized) links to other critical elements of the site (detail pages, search...)
dependencies.how: Uses Homepage for introductory pages of Brand_I brands, serving marketing data and in browse featured properties.

painPoints: Users drop out when see personalized recommendations feels fragmented across channels.
Confidence decreases when the product does not explain what happens next.

dependencies.how: Uses Homepage for introductory pages of Brand_I brands, serving marketing data and in see personalized recommendations.

capabilities.name: Search, Save, and Return
capabilities.description: Help seekers narrow the market, save intent, and come back to the right homes later.
outcomes: Faster route back to relevant homes

externalSystemsThisCapabilityDependsOn.description: Support discovery indexing and alert delivery.

flows.title: Search, Save, and Return
flows.description: Help seekers narrow the market, save intent, and come back to the right homes later.

steps.title: Search homes
keyFacts: This step shapes first relevance and perceived product quality.
Users decide quickly whether the marketplace understands their intent.
painPoints: Low relevance or weak filtering creates early abandonment.
Users lose trust when the result set feels noisy or poorly explained.

dependencies.name: Search Engine Results Page (SERP)
dependencies.description: Ability to search for classifieds through diverse criteria (by location, price range, amenities, on map...)
dependencies.how: Uses Search Engine Results Page (SERP) for search for classifieds through diverse criteria in search homes.

dependencies.name: Saved Search / Alerts
dependencies.description: Alert consumers about new classifieds - email / mobile push
dependencies.how: Uses Saved Search / Alerts for alert consumers about new classifieds - email / mobile push in search homes.

dependencies.name: Search and Messaging Services
dependencies.description: Support discovery indexing and alert delivery.
dependencies.how: Relies on Search and Messaging Services for discovery indexing and alert delivery in search homes.

steps.title: Apply location and attribute filters
keyFacts: This step shapes first relevance and perceived product quality.
Users decide quickly whether the marketplace understands their intent.
painPoints: Low relevance or weak filtering creates early abandonment.
Users lose trust when the result set feels noisy or poorly explained.

dependencies.name: Search Engine Results Page (SERP)
dependencies.description: Ability to search for classifieds through diverse criteria (by location, price range, amenities, on map...)
dependencies.how: Uses Search Engine Results Page (SERP) for search for classifieds through diverse criteria in apply location and attribute filters.

steps.title: Save search
keyFacts: This step shapes first relevance and perceived product quality.
Users decide quickly whether the marketplace understands their intent.
painPoints: Low relevance or weak filtering creates early abandonment.
Users lose trust when the result set feels noisy or poorly explained.

dependencies.name: Saved Search / Alerts
dependencies.description: Alert consumers about new classifieds - email / mobile push
dependencies.how: Uses Saved Search / Alerts for alert consumers about new classifieds - email / mobile push in save search.

dependencies.name: Search and Messaging Services
dependencies.description: Support discovery indexing and alert delivery.
dependencies.how: Relies on Search and Messaging Services for discovery indexing and alert delivery in save search.

steps.title: Return from alert
keyFacts: This step supports continuity between sessions and channels.
It helps users recover intent without restarting the whole journey.
painPoints: Users disengage when saved intent is hard to recover or alerts are noisy.
Return journeys break when notifications arrive too late or without context.

dependencies.name: Saved Search / Alerts
dependencies.description: Alert consumers about new classifieds - email / mobile push
dependencies.how: Uses Saved Search / Alerts for alert consumers about new classifieds - email / mobile push in return from alert.

dependencies.name: Notification Service
dependencies.description: Ability to send notifications with user preferences (via Email, Push, ...)
dependencies.how: Uses Notification Service for send notifications with user preferences in return from alert.

dependencies.name: Search and Messaging Services
dependencies.description: Support discovery indexing and alert delivery.
dependencies.how: Relies on Search and Messaging Services for discovery indexing and alert delivery in return from alert.

capabilities.name: Evaluate and Contact
capabilities.description: Help seekers evaluate a property and confidently contact the right owner or intermediary.

externalSystemsThisCapabilityDependsOn.description: Provide financing context and prequalification support.

flows.title: Evaluate and Contact
flows.description: Help seekers evaluate a property and confidently contact the right owner or intermediary.

steps.title: Review property details
keyFacts: This step supports user visibility, decision quality, and operational control.
Users need concise signals, not raw system output.
painPoints: Users struggle when the state is hard to interpret or act on.
Decision quality drops when key signals are delayed or buried.

dependencies.name: Classified Details Page (CDP)
dependencies.description: Ability to show a detailed page of a selected classified (description, images, agency contact information...)
dependencies.how: Uses Classified Details Page (CDP) for show a detailed page of a selected classified in review property details.

dependencies.name: Property Decision Tools
dependencies.how: Uses Property Decision Tools for property Decision Tools in review property details.

steps.title: Compare financing context
keyFacts: This step supports user visibility, decision quality, and operational control.
Users need concise signals, not raw system output.
painPoints: Users struggle when the state is hard to interpret or act on.
Decision quality drops when key signals are delayed or buried.

dependencies.name: Home Purchase Financing
dependencies.description: Ability to evaluate the feasibility of a mortgage project and show a corresponding mortgage rate (multiple degrees of maturity theoretically possible with different impact, from simple budget calculator with illustrative rate estimate (minimum), to real-time actual rates comparison covering entire market and detailed calculation parameters (advanced))
dependencies.how: Uses Home Purchase Financing for evaluate the feasibility of a mortgage project and show a corresponding mortgage rate in compare financing context.

dependencies.name: Mortgage and Financing Services
dependencies.description: Provide financing context and prequalification support.
dependencies.how: Relies on Mortgage and Financing Services for financing context and prequalification support in compare financing context.

steps.title: Shortlist home
keyFacts: Shortlist home is a meaningful step in the seeker journey flow.
Users need clear guidance and feedback here to keep moving forward.
painPoints: Users drop out when shortlist home feels fragmented across channels.
Confidence decreases when the product does not explain what happens next.

dependencies.name: Home Purchase Financing
dependencies.description: Ability to evaluate the feasibility of a mortgage project and show a corresponding mortgage rate (multiple degrees of maturity theoretically possible with different impact, from simple budget calculator with illustrative rate estimate (minimum), to real-time actual rates comparison covering entire market and detailed calculation parameters (advanced))
dependencies.how: Uses Home Purchase Financing for evaluate the feasibility of a mortgage project and show a corresponding mortgage rate in shortlist home.

steps.title: Contact owner or agent
keyFacts: This step converts intent into a real transaction or commitment.
Trust, clarity, and feedback matter more here than feature breadth.
painPoints: Users hesitate when they do not trust the outcome, price, or handoff.
Small friction at this point creates disproportionate conversion loss.

dependencies.name: Classified Details Page (CDP)
dependencies.description: Ability to show a detailed page of a selected classified (description, images, agency contact information...)
dependencies.how: Uses Classified Details Page (CDP) for show a detailed page of a selected classified in contact owner or agent.

dependencies.name: Consumer Contacting Management
dependencies.description: Creating a common intermediary/Owner contacting experience for seeker
dependencies.how: Uses Consumer Contacting Management for creating a common intermediary/Owner contacting experience for seeker in contact owner or agent.

dependencies.how: Uses Property Estimation for a service estimaitng the price of a property in estimate property value.

dependencies.description: A page with a visualization of average property prices per geographic location (from the region down to the exact address)

dependencies.name: Property Estimation
dependencies.description: A service estimaitng the price of a property
dependencies.how: Uses Property Estimation for a service estimaitng the price of a property in choose asking price.

steps.title: Create listing
keyFacts: This step determines how quickly users reach initial value.
It often combines setup effort, policy choices, and correctness checks.
painPoints: Users stall when setup asks for too much context too early.
Errors here create rework and reduce confidence in the product model.

dependencies.name: Estimation Funnel
dependencies.description: A service to collect more data about people estimating properties on our systems, potentially turning them into leads we can share with agencies
dependencies.how: Uses Estimation Funnel for a service to collect more data about people estimating properties on our systems, potentially turning them into leads we can share with agencies in create listing.

capabilities.name: Set Up a Digital Presence
capabilities.description: Help agencies represent their brand, people, and inventory correctly on the marketplace.

dependencies.name: Intermediary Profile & Directory
dependencies.description: A capability with two sides: a management page for agencies (B2B) and a public page (B2C) with an overview of an intermediary (e.g., agency), with description, logo, contact information, and listed properties
